arts.sum: Former Leeds United midfielder Kalvin Phillips has shared further insight into the rigorous training methods employed by Marcelo Bielsa at the club. Kalvin Phillips and Patrick Bamford talk Bielsa’s time at Leeds

arts.ttl: Archie Gray lined up for new Tottenham role as teen starlet makes frank Leeds United admission
arts.sum: “I don’t think too much has changed [since moving from Leeds], it’s just learning the roles of a different team and manager,” Gray told BBC Radio London . Talented youngster Archie Gray reckons he is more "robust and "strong" after a full campaign of Championship football at Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Archie Gray makes Leeds United, Tottenham transfer admission
arts.sum: Archie Gray “grateful” for Leeds development ahead of Europa League clash with Spurs Leeds fans won’t be able to help themselves but look on at Archie Gray’s development at Tottenham with envy in the coming months, having seen him leave for North London.

arts.ttl: 21-y/o Leeds United tried to sign in August scores stunner and assists in UCL thriller
arts.sum: Leeds United reportedly held interest in signing Dinamo Zagreb attacking midfielder Martin Baturina during the summer window, but now he’s shining in the Champions League. It was shared by Croatian outlet Sports ke that Leeds tabled an offer of £25million on deadline day for Dinamo Zagreb star Martin Baturina.

arts.ttl: Leeds United sent ominous promotion warning from 'absolutely delighted' rival boss
arts.sum: Leeds United promotion rivals Burnley are ahead of where manager Scott Parker expected them to be at this stage of the season, with the Clarets boss delighted with their early season form. Burnley are looking to bounce back to the Premier League at the first time of asking and currently sit in second place behind league leaders Sunderland following Tuesday night's 1-0 win over Wayne Rooney's Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Sunderland vs Leeds predictions: Black Cats a value play in key clash
arts.sum: Gareth Freeman thinks home advantage could be decisive when Championship leaders Sunderland welcome Leeds to Wearside on Friday.

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds United star Kalvin Phillips reveals Pep Guardiola frustration after 'overweight' jibe
arts.sum: England international Phillips, currently on a season-long loan deal with Ipswich Town, said the focus on social media, "just kind of grew and grew," following Guardiola's comments. Former Leeds United star Kalvin Phillips says he was left "frustrated" by the "narratives" that followed him following Pep Guardiola's comments about his weight.
